name: Jiumaojiu International Holdings Limited
summary: Jiumaojiu International Holdings Limited operates as a Chinese cuisine restaurant brand manager and operator in the People's Republic of China. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 349 restaurants and managed 32 franchised restaurants covering 60 cities in 21 provinces and four municipalities in the People's Republic of China under the Jiu Mao Jiu, Tai Er, Double Eggs, Song, and Uncle Chef brands. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
